parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Code ISO de la devise à supprimer

icon.description: Icon associated with the tag (emoji or code)

isCumulative.description: Whether the tag represents cumulative values

hidden.description: Whether the tag is hidden from display

TagDto.description: Represents a tag/label for categorizing entries

title.description: Title or label of the recurrence

amount.description: Transaction amount (positive for credit, negative for debit)

tags.description: List of tags associated with this recurrence

id.description: Unique identifier of the exchange rate

sourceCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 code of the source currency

targetCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 code of the target currency (reference currency)

valueDate.description: Validity date of the exchange rate

rate.description: Exchange rate value (1 unit of source = rate units of target)

RateDto.description: Represents an exchange rate between two currencies

title.description: Title or name of the period

startDate.description: Start date and time of the period

endDate.description: End date and time of the period

hidden.description: Whether the period is hidden from display

title.description: Title or label of the entry

description.example: Purchase of 2 laptops for the development team

amount.description: Transaction amount (positive for credit, negative for debit)

tags.description: List of tags/labels associated with this entry

reference.description: Whether this currency is the reference currency

startDate.description: Start date of the calculation period

endDate.description: End date of the calculation period

tags.description: List of tags to filter entries in the calculation

targetCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 code of the target currency for conversion (reference currency or tag currency)

ComputationRequestDto.description: Request for aggregated amount calculation over a period

numberOfEntries.description: Number of entries in this currency

totalAmount.description: Total amount in this currency (before conversion)

ComputationCurrencyAmountDto.description: Breakdown of aggregated calculation for a specific currency

startDate.description: Start date of the calculated period

endDate.description: End date of the calculated period

totalAmount.description: Total amount converted to the target currency

targetCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 code of the target currency used for conversion

numberOfEntries.description: Total number of entries included in the calculation

computationByCurrency.description: Breakdown of calculations by source currency (key = currency code, value = calculation details)
